channel.title: Thoreau Daily Journal
channel.description: A daily entry from Henry David Thoreau's journals, delivered fresh each day.

item.title: Thoreau Journal - June 29, 1840
item.description: June 29. Of all phenomena, my own race are the most mysterious and undiscoverable. For how many years have I striven to meet one, even on common manly ground, and have not succeeded!
